pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage for the aquatic center with quick access to major activities and programs. Provides tiles, announcements, and audience-based entry points that deep-link into filtered views of Programs, Lap Lanes, Memberships, Parties, Passes, and Pool Schedule.
primary_functions: Provide quick navigation tiles to key tasks such as swim lessons, lap lane reservations, memberships, parties, passes, and pool schedule.
Highlight current announcements, seasonal programs, and important alerts (closures, schedule changes).
Offer audience-based entry points, such as Kids Lessons, Adult Fitness, and Family Activities.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Kids Swim Lessons' quick tile or audience entry.
Click 'Aqua Fitness' quick tile.
Click 'Lifeguard Certification' quick tile.
Click 'Lap Lane Reservations' tile.
Click 'Family Memberships' tile.
Click 'Birthday Parties' tile.
Click 'Guest Passes' tile.
Click 'Pool Schedule' tile.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Home' link in main header navigation.
Default landing page at index.html.

pages.name: Programs & Classes
pages.description: Listing and discovery page for all programs, including swim lessons, fitness classes, and training certifications. Supports category selection and rich filters to drive flows such as kids’ swim registration, lifeguard certification enrollment, and aqua fitness class selection.
primary_functions: Allow users to select a program category such as Swim Lessons for Kids, Fitness Classes, or Training & Certifications (e.g., Lifeguard Certification).
Enable filtering of programs by age group, skill level, day-of-week, time-of-day, price, and features (such as includes_cpr).
Provide specialized filters per category, such as age and skill for swim lessons or weekend-only and end date for lifeguard certification.
Support sorting of program results (e.g., Start Date - Soonest First, Price, Total Duration).
Display program/class cards with key information and link each card to its detailed program page.

incoming_params.description: Preselects the high-level program category such as 'swim_lessons_kids', 'fitness_classes', or 'training_certifications'. Used by header links 'Programs', 'Swim Lessons for Kids', 'Fitness Classes', and 'Training & Certifications'.
Optional subcategory filter, e.g., 'aqua_fitness' or 'lifeguard_certification'.
Optional minimum age filter (in years), used especially for kids’ swim lessons.
Optional maximum age filter (in years).
Optional skill level filter such as 'beginner_1', 'beginner_2', 'intermediate', or 'advanced'.
Optional single day-of-week filter (e.g., 'monday', 'saturday').
Optional HH:MM 24-hour time filter representing the earliest class start time (e.g., '16:00' for 4:00 PM or later).
Optional HH:MM 24-hour time filter representing the latest class start time.
Optional maximum price filter for the program list (e.g., 120 for under $120).
When true, filters to lifeguard certification courses that include CPR/First Aid.
When true, filters to weekend-only programs, used for lifeguard certification flows.
Optional filter for 'indoor', 'outdoor', or 'mixed' pool location for aquatics programs.
Sort option such as 'start_date_soonest', 'price_low_to_high', or 'total_duration_shortest'.
Current results page number for pagination.
Number of programs to show per page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a program/class card in the results list.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Programs' header link for the unfiltered view.
Accessible via 'Swim Lessons for Kids' header link with categoryId=swim_lessons_kids.
Accessible via 'Fitness Classes' header link with categoryId=fitness_classes.
Accessible via 'Training & Certifications' header link with categoryId=training_certifications.
Direct URL access using query parameters to preconfigure filters (e.g., programs.html?categoryId=swim_lessons_kids&skillLevel=beginner_1).

pages.name: Program Detail
pages.description: Detail page for an individual program, class, or course (swim lessons, aqua fitness, lifeguard certification). Provides rich information and supports either direct registration/enrollment or adding the class to the cart, depending on program configuration.
primary_functions: Show complete program information, including description, schedule, dates, times, price, prerequisites, and included features such as CPR/First Aid.
Provide a registration/enrollment form for programs that register directly (e.g., kids’ swim lessons, lifeguard certification), including participant details and contact information.
Allow certain class types (such as aqua fitness classes) to be added to the shopping cart for multi-class checkout.
Display important policies, cancellation rules, and any required waivers for the specific program.

incoming_params.description: Program.id of the class or course to display. Required to load details and enable registration or add-to-cart actions.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' after successfully adding an aqua fitness or other cart-eligible program.
Click 'View in My Schedule' after a successful direct registration/enrollment.
Click 'Back to Program List' to return to the previous filtered program listing (filters preserved via browser history or URL).

access_methods.description: Accessed when a user follows a link with programId query parameter, typically from the Programs list or Pool Schedule.
Linked from My Schedule items associated with this program.

pages.name: Lap Lane Reservations
pages.description: Search and booking page for reserving lap swimming lanes. Users can select dates, filter by time and pool type, limit by price, view slot details, and complete a reservation.
primary_functions: Allow users to select a date via date picker and filter results by time range, pool type (indoor/outdoor), and maximum price.
Support sorting of available lane slots by price or time (e.g., Price - Low to High).
Display lane slot cards with time, lane number, pool type, and fee, and show more detail in a slot detail or booking panel.
Provide a reservation form for the selected lane slot where users can enter name, number of swimmers, contact phone, and confirm the reservation.

incoming_params.description: Preselected reservation date in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD), such as tomorrow’s date for quick-search flows.
Earliest desired lane start time in HH:MM 24-hour format (e.g., '06:00').
Latest desired lane end time in HH:MM 24-hour format (e.g., '07:00').
Lane pool type filter, typically 'indoor' or 'outdoor'.
Maximum reservation fee filter (e.g., 15 for under $15).
Sort order such as 'price_low_to_high' or 'time_earliest'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View My Schedule' after successful lane reservation to review the new reservation entry.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Lap Lane Reservations' header link.
Accessible via 'Lap Lane Reservations' footer link.
Accessed via lap lane quick tile on the Home page.
Date and filters can be preset via query parameters for bookmarked searches.

pages.name: Memberships
pages.description: Listing and comparison page for membership plans. Users can filter by type, duration, access, and price to choose options like 1‑month family memberships with pool and fitness access.
primary_functions: Allow filtering of memberships by type (e.g., Family), duration (e.g., 1 Month), included access (Pool Access, Fitness Center), and maximum price.
Display membership cards showing price, included amenities, and key hours such as weekday closing times.
Support sorting and manual comparison by letting users open multiple membership details in sequence.
Link each membership card to its dedicated detail and purchase page.

incoming_params.description: Preselected membership type such as 'family', 'individual', 'senior', or 'youth'.
Membership duration enum such as 'one_month', 'three_month', or 'annual'.
When true, filters plans to those that include pool access.
When true, filters plans to those that include fitness center access.
Maximum total price for the membership (e.g., 120 for under $120).
Sort order such as 'price_low_to_high' or 'weekday_close_time_latest'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a membership plan card.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Memberships' header link.
Accessible via 'Memberships' footer link.
Accessible via Memberships quick tile on Home.
Filters can be pre-applied via query parameters (e.g., memberships.html?membershipType=family&duration=one_month).

pages.name: Membership Detail
pages.description: Detail and purchase page for a specific membership plan. Shows benefits, access, hours (including weekday close times), and supports purchasing the selected plan.
primary_functions: Present full membership details, including benefits, included facilities, guest policies, and operating hours (e.g., weekday closing time).
Highlight pricing options and eligibility notes such as resident versus non-resident pricing if applicable.
Provide a purchase form where users can enter primary adult information, select a membership start date, supply contact details, and complete the purchase.
Summarize key terms, policies, and renewal information for the membership.

incoming_params.description: MembershipPlan.id of the plan being viewed and purchased.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View in My Schedule' after a successful membership purchase.
Click 'Back to Memberships' to continue comparing plans.

access_methods.description: Accessed via membershipPlanId query parameter from the Memberships listing.
Linked from My Schedule entries created for membership purchases.

pages.name: Parties & Rentals
pages.description: Overview and listing page for birthday parties and other facility rentals. Users can pick a date, party size, and amenities to see matching packages such as pool birthday parties with private rooms and pizza.
primary_functions: Show available rental categories such as Birthday Parties with tiles or category selectors.
Allow users to filter birthday party packages by date, party size/guest count, included amenities (e.g., private party room, pizza included), and maximum price.
Support sorting of party packages, for example by Price - Low to High.
Display party package cards with price and included features, and link each package to a detailed party page.

incoming_params.description: Initial party/rental category such as 'birthday_party'.
Preselected party date in ISO YYYY-MM-DD format.
Number of children expected at the party, used to compute total prices.
When true, filter to packages that include a private party room.
When true, filter to packages that include pizza.
Maximum total price filter (e.g., 350 for under $350).
Sort order such as 'price_low_to_high'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a birthday party package card.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Parties & Rentals' header link.
Accessible via 'Parties & Rentals' footer link.
Accessible via 'Birthday Parties' tile on Home.
Filters and date can be pre-applied via query parameters for saved searches.

pages.name: Party Package Detail
pages.description: Detail and reservation request page for a selected birthday party package. Confirms inclusions, date, party size, and computed total price, and captures the organizer’s details and preferred start time.
primary_functions: Show detailed information about what is included in the party package, including room access, food options like pizza, time blocks, and rules.
Confirm the selected date and party size and display the total price for the package.
Provide a reservation request form where the organizer can enter contact details and preferred party start time and submit the reservation request.
Present follow-up information such as expected response time and payment or deposit instructions.

incoming_params.description: PartyPackage.id of the package being viewed for details and reservation.
Selected party date in ISO YYYY-MM-DD format.
Number of children for which total price should be computed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View in My Schedule' after submitting a party reservation request.
Click 'Back to Party Packages' to return to filtered results.

access_methods.description: Accessed with partyPackageId, and optionally selectedDate and partySizeChildren, from the Parties & Rentals listing.
Linked from My Schedule entries for existing party reservations.

pages.name: Pool Schedule
pages.description: Interactive weekly schedule for all pool activities. Users can navigate by week, filter by activity and pool type, limit by time-of-day, and add specific sessions (like evening open swim) to My Schedule.
primary_functions: Display pool activities in a calendar or timetable view, including Open Swim, Lap Swim, classes, and special events.
Allow users to navigate by week (e.g., move to next week) and filter by activity type, pool type (indoor/outdoor), and time-of-day.
Enable users to select individual sessions (such as specific Open Swim times) and add them to their personal schedule via an 'Add to My Schedule' action.
Provide quick access to the My Schedule page so users can review all sessions they have added.

incoming_params.description: ISO date string indicating the start of the week to display (e.g., next calendar week).
Optional activity type filter such as 'open_swim', 'lap_swim', or 'class'.
Optional pool type filter such as 'indoor' or 'outdoor'.
Optional earliest session start time in HH:MM 24-hour format (e.g., '17:00' for 5:00 PM or later).
Optional latest session start time in HH:MM 24-hour format.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'My Schedule' button or link from the schedule page header.
Click on a scheduled class that is linked to a Program via related_program_id.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Pool Schedule' header link.
Accessible via 'Pool Schedule' quick tile on Home.
Week and filters can be preset via query parameters for bookmarked schedule views.

pages.name: My Schedule
pages.description: Personal schedule page summarizing all sessions, reservations, and registrations saved by the user. Includes open swim sessions, lane reservations, program registrations, party reservations, and membership purchases.
primary_functions: List all saved items such as open swim sessions, class registrations, lane reservations, and party bookings in a clear chronological view.
Allow users to view details of each scheduled item and access the related detail page if they need more information.
Provide basic management options such as removing items from the personal schedule where appropriate.
Offer links back to the Pool Schedule and relevant program or reservation pages to let users add more activities.

incoming_params.description: Optional MyScheduleItem.id to emphasize a newly added item when the page loads.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add more pool sessions' link.
Click 'Reserve more lap lanes' link.
Click 'Find more classes' link.
Click on a party reservation item to view its details.
Click on a membership purchase item to view membership details.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'My Schedule' header link.
Linked from Pool Schedule after adding sessions.
highlightItemId parameter can be used to focus the user on a specific schedule item.

pages.name: Passes
pages.description: Listing page for all passes, including digital guest passes and other visit-based products. Filters help users select passes that match desired visit counts and budget, such as 5-visit digital guest passes under a price threshold.
primary_functions: Allow filtering of passes by pass type (e.g., Guest Passes) and format or delivery method (e.g., Digital Pass).
Display pass products with key information such as number of visits, validity, and price.
Help users identify which options can provide an exact number of visits (such as 5 visits), supporting cost comparisons.
Link each pass product to a detailed pass page for configuration and purchase.

incoming_params.description: Pass type such as 'guest_passes' or 'membership_addon'.
Pass format such as 'digital_pass' or 'physical_pass'.
Desired total number of visits (e.g., 5 for 5-visit pass selection flows).
Maximum total price threshold for candidate pass products (e.g., 60 for under $60).
Sorting, typically 'price_low_to_high' to find the cheapest option.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a pass product card.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Passes' header link.
Accessible via 'Passes' footer link.
Accessible via 'Guest Passes' quick tile on Home.
Filters can be preset via query parameters for common pass searches.

pages.name: Pass Detail
pages.description: Detail and configuration page for a specific pass product. Shows visits per pass, rules, expiration, and delivery details, and lets users pick quantities before adding passes to the cart.
primary_functions: Show full details of the pass product, including number of visits per pass, usage rules, expiration, and any restrictions.
Allow users to set the quantity when the product represents a single-visit pass, or confirm a multi-visit pass product quantity.
Add the configured passes to the shopping cart for later checkout.
Surface related information such as how digital passes are delivered and how guests will redeem them.

incoming_params.description: PassProduct.id for the pass being configured.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' after adding passes to the cart.

access_methods.description: Accessed via passProductId query parameter from the Passes listing.
Linked from the Cart when editing a pass product.

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart page where users review items before checkout. Shows classes and passes added from various pages and allows quantity adjustments and item removal.
primary_functions: Display all items added to the cart, such as digital guest passes and class registrations (e.g., aqua fitness classes).
Show item details, quantities, prices, and overall subtotal to help users verify their selections.
Allow users to adjust quantities or remove items from the cart prior to purchase.
Provide a clear pathway to proceed to the checkout page to finalize purchases and registrations.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Checkout' button.
Click 'Continue shopping for passes' link.
Click 'Continue shopping for classes' link.

access_methods.description: Accessible via a cart icon in the site header from any page.
Linked after adding a pass product to the cart.
Linked after adding a class/program to the cart.

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Unified checkout page to finalize purchases and class registrations from the cart. Shows an order summary, collects purchaser details, and submits the order.
primary_functions: Present an order summary listing all items from the cart, including passes and any classes being checked out together.
Collect purchaser or participant contact information such as name, email, and any required phone number fields.
Allow selection of payment method (e.g., Credit/Debit Card) and capture necessary payment details at a high level.
Submit the order and display a confirmation message or receipt summarizing the completed purchase or registrations.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Home' after successful checkout confirmation.
Click 'View My Schedule' after checkout, to see any new scheduled program registrations.

access_methods.description: Reached after clicking 'Checkout' on the Cart page.
May be reached directly if a partially completed checkout is resumed.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Informational page about the aquatic center. Describes mission, history, facilities, and links users into key functional areas such as Memberships, Pool Schedule, and Programs.
primary_functions: Describe the mission, history, and facilities of the aquatic center and community programs offered.
Summarize general operating hours, location, and an overview of key amenities such as pools and fitness areas.
Provide links to key functional pages such as Memberships, Pool Schedule, and Programs for users who want to get started.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Membership Options' link.
Click 'View Pool Schedule' link.
Click 'Explore Programs & Classes' link.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About' footer link.
Linked from any high-level site map or help section.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact information and inquiry form for the aquatic center. Provides phone, email, address, and a form to submit questions about programs, rentals, or memberships.
primary_functions: Display primary contact details, including phone numbers, email addresses, physical address, and a simple map or directions.
Provide a general contact form for questions about programs, rentals, memberships, or other topics.
Offer links to self-service pages such as Pool Schedule, Parties & Rentals, and Passes for users who may find answers without direct contact.

incoming_params.description: Preselects the topic in the contact form (e.g., 'programs', 'parties', 'memberships', 'passes', 'lap_lanes').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View policies & FAQs' link for additional self-service information.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Contact' header link.
Accessible via 'Contact' footer link.
Linked from error or support pages when users need assistance.

pages.name: Policies & FAQs
pages.description: Central reference for pool rules, terms, and frequently asked questions. Includes facility rules, safety guidelines, membership terms, and structured FAQs linking back into functional pages.
primary_functions: Present pool and facility rules, safety guidelines, and code of conduct for swimmers and guests.
Outline membership terms, cancellation policies, refund rules for programs and parties, and waiver information.
Provide a structured FAQ section covering common questions about registrations, reservations, passes, and schedules, with links to relevant functional pages.

incoming_params.description: Optional FAQ section to scroll to on load (e.g., 'registrations', 'lap_lanes', 'passes', 'memberships', 'parties').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click link in registration-related FAQs to view Programs & Classes.
Click link in lap lane reservation FAQs.
Click link in passes FAQs.
Click link in membership terms FAQs.
Click link in party and rental FAQs.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Pool Policies & FAQs' footer link.
Linked from confirmation pages (registrations, reservations) for policy details.
sectionId query parameter can be used to deep-link to particular FAQ sections.

header_links.description: Filtered list of swim lessons for children
Filtered list of aqua fitness and other fitness classes
Filtered list of training programs such as lifeguard certification
Browse birthday party packages and facility rentals
Browse and purchase passes, including guest passes
View your saved sessions and reservations

footer_links.description: How to contact the aquatic center
Rules, terms, and frequently asked questions
Birthday party packages and other rental options
Purchase visit passes and guest passes
